name: nathan-vale-claude-code
description: Personal Claude Code plugin marketplace with productivity commands, specialized agents, and custom skills for dotfiles management and development workflows.

plugins.name: nvcc
plugins.description: Nathan's personal Claude Code setup with productivity commands, specialized agents, and custom skills for dotfiles management, shell workflows, HyperFlow keyboard orchestration, and SuperWhisper voice dictation.

plugins.name: atuin
plugins.description: Atuin shell history integration - search, capture, and manage bash command history with AI. Includes MCP server, hooks, and skills.

plugins.name: git
plugins.description: Git intelligence for Claude Code - session context, commit history, smart commits with gitmoji. Includes MCP server with 6 git tools, SessionStart/PreCompact hooks, and slash commands for commits, PRs, and history exploration.
